heading: Our track record
items: Three generations and more than 50 years in hearing health
Built and operated more than 70 audiological clinics across California and Florida
Grew to the second-largest hearing aid provider in the Sacramento Valley
Multiple clinic sales to global manufacturers, capped by the 2016 sale to Helix Hearing Care (Widex-affiliated)
Founded InnerScope in 2012 and led its pivot into retail and direct-to-consumer hearing care
Acquired the assets of iHEAR Medical (2021), a direct-to-consumer hearing technology company, and the HearingAssist brand, a leading direct-to-consumer hearing aid line
An early mover when the FDA's over-the-counter hearing aid rule took effect in 2022
Launched iHEAR Matrix over-the-counter hearing aids into major national retail in 2023
Distribution reach across major retailers and thousands of pharmacy and grocery locations
A retail shareholder base of roughly 45,000 individual investors
